contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: capoeira: Previous/Next move buttons in practice flow
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/capoeira/pull/11
  
  Details:
  capoeira.agroverse.shop practice flow: manual navigation between moves.
  
  Previously the only way to advance through a generated session was waiting
  for the per-move timer plus the 30s rest period to auto-advance. No way
  back if you wanted to re-watch a move you'd just finished, no way to skip
  ahead if you'd already mastered the current one, no way to bail out of a
  rest period.
  
  TrueSightDAO/capoeira#11 adds Previous and Next buttons flanking the
  Play Music button in the practice-section controls row. Both:
  - Honour session bounds (disabled on first/last move)
  - Reuse loadMove() which already stops audio + clears timer + hides rest
    section, so mid-flight rest periods cancel cleanly
  - Reset music/timer to idle so the user re-arms with Play Music when ready
  
  Small change (2 files, 34 inserts) but big UX impact - now feels like a
  practice tool you can actually drive instead of a fixed countdown.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
